full_text:
Sun Jun (Shuying) 孫俊 (叔英)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Jun (孫俊), styledShuying (叔英). Was well studied on the classics, was a garrison commander. Sun Jun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Jun lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
